description_long: This is a cylindrical metal barrel with a slightly tapered body and a flat, fitted lid. The exterior is painted with a green lower half and a yellow upper band featuring white diagonal stripes, giving it a utilitarian, industrial look. The paint appears weathered and chipped in places, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. There is a partially visible label on one side with the text 'Mull-Soy' and some faded, illegible writing beneath it. The top surface is solid and opaque, with no visible openings or handles. The overall construction suggests it is designed for storage or containment, likely for materials or waste in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal barrel with a green and yellow striped exterior, a flat lid, and faded labeling. It has an industrial, utilitarian appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label 'Mull-Soy' and the most visible portion of the yellow and white striped band.
description_view_1: Side view with the label partially visible and more of the green painted surface exposed.
description_view_2: Rear view with only the yellow and white striped band and green paint visible, no label.
description_view_3: Opposite side with the striped band and green paint, no visible label or markings.
attribute_labeling_or_markings: partially visible label with 'Mull-Soy' and faded text
